title: No Netherite Plugin
description: This project prevents the crafting of netherite for all players.  Op players can still spawn in netherite but nobody can use a smithing table to craft some.
body: This plugin was made for Paper/Bukkit as a way for me to start learning how to make plugins.  The plugin prevents all players from using a smithing table to craft netherite armor or tools.  If you intend to do a juggernaut event or have like one set of netherite on a server, you can still spawn in netherite through the /give command or creative mode.
